name: Chult
summary: A hot, ancient jungle peninsula filled with dinosaurs, ruins, powerful old magic, poisonous plants and lost civilisations.
politics: Port Nyanzaru is dominated by wealthy merchant interests.
Remote jungle regions are controlled by survival, tribes, monsters and whoever has the strength to hold territory.
culture: Guides, hunters, traders and explorers are common around settlements.
Jungle travel is dangerous and often requires local knowledge.
Dinosaurs are part of daily life in some areas, not just monsters.
